Meeting: Sprint Review — Team Platform
Date: 2026-03-22
Attendees: Alice, Bob, Carol, David

[00:00] Alice: Good morning everyone. Let's get started with the sprint review.
[00:45] Bob: We completed all the sprint backlog items from the iteration plan.
[01:15] Carol: The velocity this sprint was strong — about 38 story points delivered.
[02:00] Alice: Action items: review the deployment plan, update onboarding documentation.
[02:30] David: We need follow-up on the metrics dashboard rollout.
[03:10] Bob: Decisions: we'll proceed with the event-driven architecture option.
[03:45] Carol: Discussion point — should we add more automated tests to the pipeline?
[04:00] Alice: Agreed. Action item: Alice will create tickets for test coverage gaps.
[04:30] David: Minutes complete. Meeting adjourned.
